summary.intent: Fix review comments on PR #763 adding NIP-59 gift wrap support to the moltis nostr crate.
summary.outcome: All three review comments resolved (magic constant replaced with time crate duration, subscribe logic split into two calls, constant shared with test), tests and lints passing, changes committed and pushed.

repo: Gift wrap logic lives in crates/nostr/src/gift_wrap.rs and bus.rs within the moltis repo.
Integration tests for the nostr crate are in crates/nostr/tests/nostr_integration.rs.
The project enforces clippy lints and rustfmt as part of the PR workflow.
A 172_800 second (48-hour) constant was previously hardcoded; convention is to use the time crate for durations.

code.finding: Contains the NIP-59 gift wrap implementation; the 172_800s constant was defined here and should be shared with bus.rs and tests.
Subscribe logic for gift wrap events; splitting into two subscribe calls avoids replaying stale kind:4 messages.
Integration test was using its own copy of the 172_800 constant; updated to import the shared constant from the library.

workflow: Review comments were fetched via Bash/gh before starting fixes, giving a clear checklist.
Tests, clippy, and fmt were all verified locally before committing and pushing.
